cases.name: valid_mutating_orchestration
cases.input: Execute Alfa maintenance on an isolated branch with baseline, preservation manifest, cleanup manifest, and validation evidence.

cases.name: no_isolated_branch_blocks
cases.input: Evaluate a mutating orchestration report that runs on main and still says proceed.

cases.name: missing_preservation_blocks
cases.input: Evaluate a cleanup/import plan that lacks local-state-preservation manifest evidence.

cases.name: cleanup_without_manifest_blocks
cases.input: Evaluate cleanup actions that have no cleanup manifest.

cases.name: phase_order_enforced
cases.input: Evaluate a report that runs branch-plan before local-state-preservation.

cases.name: no_push_policy
cases.input: Evaluate a report that allows push during maintenance without explicit user order.

cases.name: validation_gate_coverage
cases.input: Evaluate a report that omits check-repo-boundaries and count-components from validation.

cases.name: dependency_matrix_present
cases.input: Plan maintenance and show integration with repo-sync-auditor, local-state-preservation, workspace-governance, git-workflow, safe-scripting-and-bash, quality-gatekeeper, tasklog-management, and session-end-cleanup.
